sections.03-frontend: Architecture, shell, portal map, component/UI patterns
sections.07-ui-ux: UX structure, portal audit, labels, nav
sections.09-qa: Build commands, gaps, risks, manual checks

recentExplorationCacheUpdates.notes: Admin API/query refactor: installed Axios, rewired admin API client internals while preserving helper semantics, split all shared admin API domains into folder modules, migrated imports off legacy *.api.ts barrels, added admin Query client/keys/queries structure, moved DG circuit list and mutations to TanStack Query, converted feature-local API adapters to api/index.ts, added DG circuit source/deep-link filtering, retired duplicate courrier actions from Demandes in favor of Courriers officiels navigation, split RequestsPage into orchestration/list/detail/KPI components, hardened DG review creation so returned/decision-recorded reviews cannot be overwritten by a later send-to-DG action, split backend DG circuit service helpers/types/review writes into focused modules while preserving public exports, introduced router/controller/service/repository layering for the DG circuit API, reorganized the request module into constants/helpers/types/services/repository/controllers/routes folders, split request services into portal/admin workflow services, added a shared request repository with compatibility barrels preserved, started the OMA module refactor with root index facade, services/models folders, and shared OMA actor/record/access helpers, and extracted formal request constants/helpers from the formal service. Admin build PASS; API typecheck PASS.

Portal API client refactor: domain folders, Axios HTTP layer under api/http, TanStack Query provider, query client/keys/queries folder split, usePortalRequests/usePortalMeetings/usePortalNotifications, MyRequestsPage and PortalDashboardPage migrated to Query. Portal typecheck PASS; build PASS after outside-sandbox rerun for known Windows Tailwind/Vite native issue.

Admin account request page split into focused components, filter card hardened with shadcn controls, date picker introduced, right-side drawer detail with tabs, approve/reject dialogs hardened with shadcn fields/cards/selects and organization-canonicalization guidance. Portal badge/card usage aligned.
Portal account request and login forms hardened with React Hook Form, shadcn UI fields/inputs/buttons/cards/badges, Sonner notifications, localized public copy, and inline login error feedback.

Personnel ANAC integration corrections: Axios adapter, correct ANAC search shape /personnel/search?q=&limit=, nested payload mapping, list endpoint for blank admin table, matricule-based activation flow, focused request/error logging, and Docker cheatsheet including seed commands.

Audit of admin/portal UI patterns for Phase 3 workspace. No implementation. Confirmed DossierPhasesTab routing, UploadDocumentDialog, DialogKey pattern, openBlobInNewTab, hasPermission guard, portal inline upload forms, action-required cards. Produced full slice plan: OMA-EVAL-5A (API types), 5B (workspace), 5C (integration), 6A (portal API), 6B (portal UI), 7 (cross-tab polish).

Phase 3 close: closeDocumentEvaluationPhase with server-side DB aggregate guard (no pending/non_satisfaisant/correction_submitted), Phase 4 inspection OmaPhase creation, dossier.status=inspection_phase, postulant notification, audit event. POST /close [PHASE_CLOSE]. API PASS.

Correction loop: correction_submitted status + correctionRequestedAt/submittedAt/submittedById fields on DocumentEvaluation; corrected_document documentType; uploadDocumentEvaluationCorrection service; POST /portal/document-evaluations/:evaluationId/correction. syncEvaluationStatus updated for correction_submitted. API PASS.

Document evaluation: DocumentEvaluationModel (document_evaluations), auto-init from Phase 2 submissions (idempotent, payment-gated, gate requirements excluded), getDocumentEvaluations (GET + auto-init), reviewDocumentEvaluation (PATCH satisfaisant/non_satisfaisant + annotation + docEvalStatus sync). API PASS.

Phase 3 payment gate: PhasePaymentModel, document-evaluation.service, s5_agent role, PAYMENT_INVOICE_UPLOAD/PAYMENT_VIEW permissions, OmaPhase.documentEvaluationStatus, admin invoice upload + read, portal payment state + proof upload. API PASS.
Dashboard correction pass: official SLA constants, placeholder phase badges, unavailable certificate display, priority document labels, and French label cleanup.

API-backed admin dashboard with period selector, DN/courrier profiles, phase focus, priority actions, recent activity, and certificate unavailable display. Narrow backend contract correction for DASH-2 response shape.
Full rewrite of admin Documents tab into compact phase accordion. Phase 1 + Phase 2 documents, Phases 3-5 placeholder. No backend changes.
